title: pleiotaxis racemosa
intro: Pleiotaxis racemosa, also known as the Pleiotaxis or Globe Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleiotaxis racemosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and a treatment for skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Pleiotaxis racemosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
